title: crosswalks and a pedestrian user survey which sought pedestrian perceptions toward various pedestrian
research_problem: Automatically extract structured literature review signals from academic papers.
method_summary: A pipeline that combines retrieval, PDF parsing, chunking, and structured extraction.

main_claims.claim_text: The pipeline can transform parsed paper chunks into a structured paper profile.
The system supports downstream gap analysis by preserving evidence links.

limitations.text: The current output may rely on stubbed model behavior before real LLM integration.

notes: Stub extraction response for local development.
